corrections.resolution: Close all 16 answer schemas, define every property and list item shape, and make the factor-relation quotient witness conditional: a true factor requires a positive integer quotient while a false factor requires quotient=null.
Bind every placeholder to an input, context, derived or fixed role. Replace the free answerRole slot in equal partition with two closed variants for segment count and per-segment quantity.
State that each group or box has equal counts across groups without implying the two categories are equal to each other, and bind length-to-area unit conversion explicitly.
Replace open semantic classification with a finite mutually-exclusive decision table covering factor, multiple, common_factor and common_multiple.
Lock the allowed statement kinds, relation direction and parity theorem usage, and require one boolean output for each ordered statement.

Add the missing selection, statement, inverse-factor and parity hooks, require the S81 overlay hook on all five corrected PatternSpecs, and assign all 64 blocking codes exactly once across nine stages.

goalDistance.distanceReduced: Reviewed all 22 PatternSpec contracts, closed 16 answer schemas, role-bound eight controlled templates, locked semantic decision and statement grammars, and completed exact nine-stage/64-code validator coverage.
remainingBlockers: g5a_u02_5a02a1 public source metadata still requires the 公因數 and /5a03b/ correction.
FormalMapping, PatternGroup and PatternSpec materialization are absent.
Generator and blocking validator runtime are absent.
Public selector, canonical routing, worksheet and renderer integration are absent.
